name: TC-QQ-021-Verify Date/Time question can be configured and saved successfully

steps.name: Wait for selector getByText('Drag here to add questions')
Expect "toBeVisible" getByText('Drag here to add questions')
Expect "toBeVisible" getByText('DATE AND OR TIME Question').last()
Expect "toBeEnabled" getByText('DATE AND OR TIME Question').last()
Click getByText('DATE AND OR TIME Question').last()
Fill "What is your date of birth?" getByTestId('questionName')
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('[role="option"] span:first-child').getByText('Date Time', { exact: true })
